one_time_description: Earnings from investment in Nation business entities (0987339 BC Ltd.) - large non-recurring equity pickup from Stellat'en Holdings Limited Partnership
economic_notes: Nation acquired 25% ownership of Endako Tsey Limited Partnership and Endako Tsey GP Corporation during 2022, accounted for at cost. Also holds 25% in Lhai Ventures Limited Partnership. Resource industry revenue present. 0987339 BC Ltd. had comprehensive income of $3,415,645.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd. Large earnings from investment in Nation business entities ($3,415,303) significantly inflates surplus - non-recurring. Auditor office located in Prince George BC but firm name not explicitly stated in extracted text - identified as BDO Canada LLP based on Prince George address context. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC $3,045,048 + CMHC $401,911 + FNHA $395,783 + Ottawa Trust $1,488 + Province of BC $143,459 + PGAEAT $115,891 = $4,103,580 government; remaining $8,687,407 includes Carrier Sekani Tribal Council and CSFS which may be transfer payments - if CSTC and CSFS included as transfers: $3,571,959 + $722,625 = $4,294,584; total govt transfers = $8,398,164; OSR = $4,392,823). Total government transfers estimated including CSTC and CSFS as transfer organizations.
